families.name: proliferation_vs_differentiation
families.rationale: Anaplastic (Grade III) tumors show elevated mitotic markers while losing oligodendroglial/neural progenitor differentiation programs.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_baseline < 0.05 vs MKI67-alone or if permutation p > 0.05.

families.name: mitotic_cyclin_contrast
families.rationale: G2/M cell-cycle machinery rises with grade while astrocytic differentiation marker GFAP declines in higher-grade anaplastic tumors.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if AUC gain over CDK1 alone < 0.03 or if bootstrap CI on contrast crosses zero.

families.name: hypoxia_glycolysis_balance
families.rationale: Higher-grade gliomas often display hypoxic/glycolytic shift relative to oxidative mitochondrial metabolism.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if permutation p > 0.1 or if delta over LDHA-alone < 0.02 (signal may be too weak within IDH-mutant LGG).

families.name: EMT_invasion_axis
families.rationale: Mesenchymal/invasive program may distinguish anaplastic progression, though gliomas use atypical EMT.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if direction flips on cross-validation folds or if permutation p > 0.05.

families.name: housekeeping_negative_control
families.rationale: Housekeeping genes should not separate grades; included as ex-ante negative control.
families.skeptic_test: Should fail with permutation p > 0.2 and delta_baseline near zero; if it passes, suspect normalization artifact.
